'''Spirited Spirits''' was a business located in [[Hedrett]] that dealt in mixed [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverages. It was owned by [[Yves Arsen]] and its head of research and development was [[Shayne Gerrare]]. One of its most famous and successful products was the [[Double-Dip Outer Rim Rumdrop]], which was created by Gerrare. In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], Gerrare and most of the stockboys of ''Spirits'' disappeared to join the [[Cularin resistance]]; Arsen regretted only Gerrare's absence.<ref name="R">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}} {{1st}}
